TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Sagaran, title = Sagaran, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Sagaran} }

S.FORM: alang Sagaran ga niya mki sku Heto Keng atu Santimon go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 195 buwan, 698 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 95% kyan ku 662 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 5% kyan ku 36 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 89%, Rukay 2%, Bunun 1%, Amis 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Sagaran hya' ga Valjulu. tay mkyahu' na Sagaran hya' ga Tjailjaking. tay 'llaw na Sagaran hya' ga Tjukuvulj. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Sagaran ga niya mki sku Heto Keng atu Santimon go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 195 buwan, 698 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 95% kyan ku 662 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 5% kyan ku 36 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 89%, Rukay 2%, Bunun 1%, Amis 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Sagaran hya' ga Valjulu. tay mkyahu' na Sagaran hya' ga Tjailjaking. tay 'llaw na Sagaran hya' ga Tjukuvulj. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ s~ɕaɣaran ɣa nija mki s~ɕku ħeto keŋ atu s~ɕantimon ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, pajwan **%, rukaj *%, βunun *%, amis~ɕ *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj mkrajaʔ na s~ɕaɣaran ħjaʔ ɣa *aljulu. taj mkjaħuʔ na s~ɕaɣaran ħjaʔ ɣa tjailjakiŋ. taj ʔllaw na s~ɕaɣaran ħjaʔ ɣa tjuku*ulj. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
